Our books

Find your little one's next favourite

Our story

Books made with love for curious little minds.

WhoseBooks was born from a simple belief — that every child deserves books that make them smile, learn, and dream. We carefully design each book to be age-appropriate, engaging, and genuinely fun.

From toddlers discovering colors for the first time to older kids diving into complex scenes, we have a book for every stage of childhood.

🎨

Kids Coloring Books

Beautiful illustrations from simple shapes for toddlers — all screen-free fun.

📚

Activity & Learning

Mazes, puzzles, and writing practice that make learning feel like play.

⭐

Safe & Kid-Friendly

Thick non-bleed paper using child-safe inks. Parent-approved, kid-adored.

💳 Instamojo Payment Settings

✅ API credentials are saved. Customers can pay via Instamojo.
Setup Instructions:
1. Sign up at instamojo.com (use test.instamojo.com for sandbox)
2. Go to Settings → API & Plugins to get your API Key and Auth Token
3. Paste them below and save — payments will go live immediately
4. Set the INR price for each book in Add Book / Edit Book
✅ Firebase Proxy Active: Payments are routed through your Firebase Cloud Function (instamojoProxy) — no CORS issues. Credentials are secure on the server.
✅ Instamojo settings saved!
